productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Limitless Black Sports Shoes
description: With the nike Air Max Limitless shoe you can train with comfort and style. Gearing up for any sport requires a demanding aerobic regimen. The nike Air Max Limitless running shoe goes beyond a Sports trainer with a low-profile, flexible design built with distance-ready cushioning. Including a pop of color and a modern, streamlined look, this shoe is a lightweight blend of style and comfort. The Nike Air Max Limitless wraps the foot in soft comfort with an innersleeve, while its low profile ensures a lightweight, low-to-the-ground feel. A mesh upper circulates air with every step to keep the foot cool on hot days, while a modern, streamlined silhouette is marked with vibrant colour details that make a statement. A full-length Phylon midsole teams up with a visible Max Air unit in the heel for superb impact protection that helps extend every training session. A waffle pattern at the outsole enhances cushioning on any surface and provides long-lasting durability. Upper Mesh upper for enhanced breathability Padded collar and tongue Lace-up system for customised snug Fit Midfoot strap for stability and support – prevents side-to-side slippage Midsole Max Air technology for maximum impact protection and cushioning Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfort High-density rubber defines the heel so that every stride is immune to shock, especially on harder surfaces like streets and synthetic tracks Outsole Deep flex grooves for a smoother, more efficient stride Solid rubber outsole for durability with grooves and lugs for great grip Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
